underlying_goal: Complete a 9-phase task system refactoring, deploy it, fix deployment issues, and begin planning a new manual batch operations feature
friction_detail: Deployment failed because prisma db push needed --accept-data-loss flag for the new unique constraint, requiring a fix and redeploy.
brief_summary: User continued a large task system refactoring, needed code review fixes, deployment, debugging a deployment failure (prisma schema issue), adding a favicon, and planning a manual batch operations feature — all were addressed successfully.
